scripts.build:pages: npx opennextjs-cloudflare build && cp -r .open-next/assets/* .open-next/ && cp -r .open-next/assets/.* .open-next/ 2>/dev/null || true && echo '{"version":1,"include":["/*"],"exclude":["/_next/*","/favicon.ico","/trader*.png","/*.svg","/*.ico"]}' > .open-next/_routes.json && mv .open-next/worker.js .open-next/_worker.js
scripts.deploy: npm run build:pages && wrangler pages deploy .open-next
